food.name: Regular Cola

identity.basisReason: Per-100g basis matches beverage-label conventions and keeps comparisons clean against other drinks.
excludes: cola with added juice or dairy

scoreReadiness.summary: This generic regular-cola record is simple and stable enough for launch scripting because the core story is just sugar delivery plus minimal nutrition.

sourceNotes: Identity locked to standard sugar-sweetened regular cola, per 100 g as sold.
Core nutrient values align with generic beverage nutrition-label style cola entries.
This is intentionally a generic regular-cola record rather than a specific brand SKU.

topPros.title: very available and cheap

explanation.summary: Pros are carrying this food most, while cons are holding it back most. It lands in D tier.

closing.summary: Regular Cola does have a few real-world upsides. But the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
closing.useCaseNote: Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

reviewChecklist: Verify nutrient values are sourced well enough for publishable use.
Review narration for category repetition and trim any awkward lines.
Confirm subtitle density stays readable at phone speed.
Replace placeholder hero/sprite art with final asset selection.
Check that the final tier verdict feels editorially defensible.
nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.
